description.p: Elektron Electrum is a lightweight Elektron Net (ELEK) wallet focused on speed, with low resource usage. It is a fork of Electrum (https://electrum.org/), adapted for Elektron Net's chain parameters (Bech32 HRP "be", SLIP-44 coin type 1370); see https://github.com/kutlusoy/elektron-net for the underlying network. Startup times are instant because it operates in conjunction with an elektron-net-electrs server that handles the most complicated parts of the Elektron Net system.

developer.name: Elektron Net developers (fork of Electrum by the Electrum developers)
